title: helianthus mollissimus
intro: Helianthus mollissimus, also known as the woolly sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and promoting wound healing. Helianthus mollissimus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or salve, and it is sometimes combined with other herbs in traditional medicine to enhance its effects.
